workflow.name: SDLC Assessment Approve
workflow.goal: Extend the seeded Python CLI with an assess command that emits a deterministic JSON assessment packet and a release package reference, then clear the acceptance assessment on the first implementation revision.

parameters.assessment_contract: Approve the first implementation revision only if `python3 -m workflow_cli assess --scenario-name sdlc-assessment-approve --assessment-contract "<contract>"` succeeds, emits stable JSON with scenario_name, assessment_contract, assessment_status=approved, release_ready=true, and a non-empty package_reference, and `./scripts/verify.sh` passes.

instructions.content: This workspace already contains a seeded Python standard-library CLI scaffold. Keep the existing stack and layout. Verify changes with `./scripts/verify.sh`. Do not install new system packages unless a genuine runtime dependency is missing from the seeded path.
